name: Crockpot Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except sherry and crushed crackers in a Crock-Pot.
2. Stir well to ensure all components are mixed evenly.
3. Cover the pot and cook on Low setting for 3 to 5 hours.
4. Just before serving, stir in sherry and crumbs to thicken the soup.
5. Makes about 2 quarts.
6. Note: You may also add shrimp to this soup for variation.
